response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON for the song 'Ridin' on Dreams'. This segment covers the opening verse and the first rhythmic break. I have transcribed the vocals from the start of the singing at 00:01.330 through to 00:23.500, ensuring timestamps are strictly tied to the vocal waveform. I have included the 'woah' and 'hey' vocalizations as they are prominent lyrical elements. No on-screen lyrics were present in this fan-art slideshow, so the Reference JSON and audio dictation were used for content and timing respectively.
